title: Garden Route Badgers runners-up in fiercely contested rural tournament
description: CRICKET NEWS - Boland clinched the rural...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Boland clinched the rural tournament for coastal provinces on Sunday 9 February after they defeated the hosts, the Garden Route Badgers, by 19 runs in a fiercely contested final.


> The final was played at the Recreation Ground in the T20 format.


The two teams also met on Saturday's second-session pool match, when the Bolanders won by 34 runs. The Badgers were victorious in their first two matches that were played in the 50 over format and won their T20 match in the first session against the Iinyathi Country.

Summarised scorecards

Garden Route Badgers beat Iinyathi Aloes by 4 wickets (50 over format):

Iinyathi Aloes 111 all out - 28.6 overs (Lethabo Gulwa 33, Sinithemba Tshomela 25, Anaxolo Kitshini 5/32, Charl Francois Marais 2/30, Jeandré van Wyk 2/8)

Garden Route Badgers 112/6 - 31.2 overs (Jean Heunis 46*, Bongolwethu Makeleni 3/22)

Garden Route Badgers beat EP Grahamstown by 45 runs (50 over format):

Garden Route Badgers 211/7 – 50 overs (Camron Avontuur 49, Carlton Rasmus 46, Berthal September 27, Richard Brotherton 2/54, Jurie Norval 2/33, EP Grahamstown 166 all out – 32.3 (Romario Fritz 63, Seviano Jasson 26, Jurie Norval 26, Corné Kennedy 4/32, Stefan May 4/1)

Garden Route Badgers beat Iinyathi Country by 20 runs (T20 format):

Garden Route Badgers 127/7 – 20 overs (Berthal September 42, Luxolo Tsewu 2/25)

Iinyathi Country 107 all out – 20 overs (Sinothando Adonis 55, Anoxolo Khitshini 3/14, Corné Kennedy 3/18, Jean Heunis 2/4)

Boland beat Garden Route Badgers by 34 runs (T20 format):

Boland 97 all out – 19 overs (Corné Kennedy 3/14, Anoxolo Khitshini 2/25, Yamkela Xakani 2/14)

Garden Route Badgers 63 all out – 17.5 overs (Stefan May 23, Lo-Waydon Siegelaar 4/8, Christo Lukas 3/11)

Final

Boland beat Garden Route Badgers by 19 runs (T20 format):

Boland 126/6 – 20 overs (Jecean Klaase 46, Matthew Thorne 2/28, Jeandre van Wyk 2/17)

Garden Route Badgers 107/8 – 20 overs (Stefan May 25, Basil George 2/24)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
